chunks.text: Faculty Support Staff. Faculty Contacts: eecs-chair@eecs.berkeley.edu for communication with EE and CS Chairs. faculty-award@eecs.berkeley.edu for faculty award information. acad-personnel@eecs.berkeley.edu for academic personnel matters like merits and promotions. eecsfac-updates@eecs.berkeley.edu for faculty information updates. Course support contacts for textbooks and copying.

Setting up a computer in an office in Cory, Soda, or Sutardja Dai Halls. Faculty IT needs can be arranged through the Computer User Support Group (CUSG) by purchasing a workstation contract. Questions can be sent to the EECS Help Desk at help@eecs.berkeley.edu.

EECS Chairs Office. Office Manager: Thomas Silva at 231 Cory, +1 (510) 642-7699, thomassilva@eecs.berkeley.edu. Assistant to the EECS Chairs: Alex Sandoval at 385 Soda, +1 (510) 642-0253, alexandersandoval@eecs.berkeley.edu.

Academic Personnel. Handles faculty, visiting faculty, lecturer appointments, promotions, visas, pay rates, benefits, sabbatical leave, and University rules. Director: Julia Flinker at 381 Soda Hall, +1 (510) 643-6618, jflinker@berkeley.eu.

Academic Personnel Managers. EE – Chris Ruggiero at 223 Cory Hall, +1 (510) 643-8208, chrisjru@eecs.berkeley.edu. CS – Monica Aiello at 395 Soda Hall, +1 (510) 643-5383, monica.aiello@eecs.berkeley.edu. EE/CS – Pamela Ong at 369 Soda Hall, +1 (510) 643-7848, mailto:pong@eecs.berkeley.edu.
Academic Personnel Analysts. EE – Heather Levien at 223 Cory Hall, heather@eecs.berkeley.edu. CS – Jessica Rojas at 395 Soda Hall, +1 510 644-4674, jessicarojas@eecs.berkeley.edu. CS – open position.

Faculty Awards. Contact: Heather Levien at 223 Cory Hall, heather@eecs.berkeley.edu. People section includes Alumni, Students, Faculty, Staff, and Leadership with various subcategories like awards and organizations.
